name: forgeflow
description: Artifact-first delivery harness for AI coding agents: staged workflow, gates, evidence, and independent review

interface.shortDescription: Artifact-first planning, execution, review, verification, and finish workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use ForgeFlow to guide coding agents through artifact-backed clarify, plan, execute, review, verify, ship, and finish workflows with explicit gates and evidence instead of chat-memory vibes.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan, implement, verify, and finish this coding task.
